---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / use case

What are you trying to do? What's missing or awkward today? (For workflow gaps,
describe the end-to-end study you're running.)

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see — a new command, function, option, or behavior.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional context

Links, references, or examples from other tools.
